description.zh-Hans: 将灰度输入通过多段颜色渐变映射。每个色标定义亮度范围内特定位置的颜色。支持抖动以获得像素艺术风格效果。
description.en: Maps grayscale input through a multi-stop color gradient. Each stop defines a color at a specific position along the luminance range. Supports dithering for a pixel-art look.

triggers.zh-Hans: 着色, 渐变着色, 伪彩色, 亮度映射, 颜色渐变
triggers.en: colorize, gradient color, pseudo-color, luminance map, color gradient

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 将灰度图像着色为从深蓝到白色的渐变。
exampleUsage.en: Colorize a grayscale image with a gradient from dark blue to white.
